name: Shattered Compact
specialty: A versatile group known for their unorthodox approach to problem-solving, specializing in high-stakes infiltration and retrieval missions that other teams deem impossible.

members.name: Vexil Nightshade
members.note: Once a high-ranking member of the Argent Blades, she was expelled for defying orders that led to the successful rescue of a colleague.

members.name: Kegan Ironfist
members.note: A former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, he defected after refusing to participate in an illegal contract, leaving behind a trail of broken limbs as a warning.

members.name: Aria Sparkswift
members.note: Once an operative for the Guild of Ashen Scrolls, she was disavowed for her role in exposing their involvement in a major scandal.

visual: They wear matching black leather jackets adorned with a silver compass emblem, a symbol of their shared history and the name 'Shattered Compact'. Their gear is a blend of practical and unassuming, with an air of mystery and danger that follows them wherever they go.
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity speak of a group with unyielding morals, willing to challenge the city's powerful factions to uphold justice. Some call them troublemakers, while others regard them as heroes.
